clusters.title: Man charged with impaired driving after after hitting Louisiana crowd celebrating Lao New Year
clusters.neutral_headline: Man Charged With Impaired Driving In Louisiana

items.title: Man charged with impaired driving after after hitting Louisiana crowd celebrating Lao New Year
items.standfirst: At least 15 people injured in incident with authorities saying some of the injuries believed to be seriousAt least 15 people were injured on Saturday after an alleged drunk driver ploughed into pedestrians at a Louisiana parade celebrating the Lao New Year. Some of the injuries are believed to be serious, authorities said.Louisiana State Police said a man had been charged with driving while impaired, 18 counts of first-degree negligent injuring and careless operation, after the incident in New Iberia. Continue reading...
items.content: At least 15 people injured in incident with authorities saying some of the injuries believed to be seriousAt least 15 people were injured on Saturday after an alleged drunk driver ploughed into pedestrians at a Louisiana parade celebrating the Lao New Year. Some of the injuries are believed to be serious, authorities said.Louisiana State Police said a man had been charged with driving while impaired, 18 counts of first-degree negligent injuring and careless operation, after the incident in New Iberia. Continue reading...

items.title: Driver charged with DWI after vehicle crashes into crowd at Louisiana parade
items.standfirst: Officials said the incident does not appear to be an intentional act based on a preliminary investigation.
items.content: Officials said the incident does not appear to be an intentional act based on a preliminary investigation.

items.title: Car slams into Louisiana Lao New Year parade, injuring about 15 people
items.standfirst: Authorities in New Iberia, Louisiana, have said the incident does not appear to be an intentional car-ramming.
items.content: Authorities in New Iberia, Louisiana, have said the incident does not appear to be an intentional car-ramming.

ai_summary: At least 15 people injured in incident
Driver charged with driving while impaired
Incident occurred at Lao New Year parade
Authorities say some injuries are serious
Investigation is ongoing

clusters.title: Middle East crisis live: Iran says at least five people killed by US-Israeli attacks during US pilot rescue operation
clusters.neutral_headline: Iran Says Five Killed In US Israeli Attacks

items.title: Middle East crisis live: Iran says at least five people killed by US-Israeli attacks during US pilot rescue operation
items.standfirst: Trump says ‘not a single American’ was killed during rescue of second crew member from F-15 fighter jetIranian media has claims that a US aircraft was destroyed while searching for the crew member of a missing US F-15 fighter jet.“An American enemy aircraft that was searching for the pilot of a downed fighter jet was destroyed by the fighters of Islam in the southern region of Isfahan,” the Tasnim news agency quoted Iran’s Revolutionary Guards as saying. The Guardian was unable to verify their claim. Continue reading...
items.content: Trump says ‘not a single American’ was killed during rescue of second crew member from F-15 fighter jetIranian media has claims that a US aircraft was destroyed while searching for the crew member of a missing US F-15 fighter jet.“An American enemy aircraft that was searching for the pilot of a downed fighter jet was destroyed by the fighters of Islam in the southern region of Isfahan,” the Tasnim news agency quoted Iran’s Revolutionary Guards as saying. The Guardian was unable to verify their claim. Continue reading...

items.title: Middle East war live: Iran says five killed in strikes during US pilot rescue
items.standfirst: Strikes killed five people overnight in Iran's southwest during the rescue of a missing US crewmember of a downed F-15 fighter jet, Iranian media reported Sunday. Iran also said that it destroyed three US aircrafts – two Black Hawk helicopters and one C-130 transport aircraft – during the same operation. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.
items.content: Strikes killed five people overnight in Iran's southwest during the rescue of a missing US crewmember of a downed F-15 fighter jet, Iranian media reported Sunday. Iran also said that it destroyed three US aircrafts – two Black Hawk helicopters and one C-130 transport aircraft – during the same operation. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.

ai_summary: Iran reports five people killed in US Israeli strikes
Strikes occurred during US pilot rescue operation
Iran claims to have destroyed US aircraft
US pilot rescued in southern Iran
Incident escalates Middle East tensions

clusters.title: Archbishop prays for Middle East peace in first Easter sermon
clusters.neutral_headline: Archbishop Calls For Middle East Peace

items.title: Archbishop prays for Middle East peace in first Easter sermon
items.standfirst: Dame Sarah Mullally called for an 'end to the violence and destruction' before a congregation in Canterbury.
items.content: Dame Sarah Mullally called for an 'end to the violence and destruction' before a congregation in Canterbury.

items.title: Iran conflict to forefront of UK religious and political leaders’ Easter messages
items.standfirst: Archbishop of Canterbury to issue urgent call for peace, as PM exhorts Britons to ‘choose community over division’Religious and political leaders in the UK are highlighting the conflict in the Middle East in their Easter messages, calling for “peace, justice and freedom” in the region.The archbishop of Canterbury will deliver her first Easter sermon at Canterbury Cathedral on Sunday as the Church of England’s top bishop. Dame Sarah Mullally will call “with renewed urgency” for peace in the Middle East and pray for “an end to the violence and destruction” in the region. Continue reading...
items.content: Archbishop of Canterbury to issue urgent call for peace, as PM exhorts Britons to ‘choose community over division’Religious and political leaders in the UK are highlighting the conflict in the Middle East in their Easter messages, calling for “peace, justice and freedom” in the region.The archbishop of Canterbury will deliver her first Easter sermon at Canterbury Cathedral on Sunday as the Church of England’s top bishop. Dame Sarah Mullally will call “with renewed urgency” for peace in the Middle East and pray for “an end to the violence and destruction” in the region. Continue reading...

ai_summary: Archbishop prays for peace in Middle East

items.title: Fugitive mafia boss wanted for murder arrested at Amalfi coast luxury villa
items.standfirst: Roberto Mazzarella, head of a notorious Camorra clan, had been on the run for more than a yearAn Italian mafia boss, who was one of Italy’s most dangerous fugitives, has been arrested on murder charges after more than a year on the run, Italian police said on Saturday.Roberto Mazzarella was the head of the notorious Mazzarella clan of the Camorra – the Naples-based organised crime gang. Continue reading...
